security.title: XSS payload stored in user data
security.detail: User name contains unsanitized <script> tag. The sanitizeString() function exists but is not applied during user creation/storage.

security.title: SQL injection patterns in user data
security.detail: SQL injection patterns stored in user name field. While not exploitable with localStorage, this data could be dangerous when migrating to a real database. sanitizeString() does not strip SQL patterns.

security.title: Client-side only rate limiting
security.detail: checkRateLimit() in utils/sanitize.ts uses sessionStorage and can be bypassed by clearing storage or using a different browser. Need server-side rate limiting for production.

security.title: No maximum quantity limit
security.detail: 2 orders placed with 100+ units of a single product. No server-side limit enforced.

missingFeatures.title: Server-side input sanitization
missingFeatures.detail: sanitizeString() from utils/sanitize.ts should be applied to all user input fields during registration and profile update, not just on display

missingFeatures.title: SQL injection pattern detection
missingFeatures.detail: Add SQL keyword detection to sanitizeString() for defense-in-depth before backend migration

missingFeatures.title: Server-side quantity limits
missingFeatures.detail: Add a global maximum quantity per order line (e.g., 99 units) to prevent abuse and inventory errors

missingFeatures.title: Numeric stock for all products
missingFeatures.detail: All products should have a numeric stock value instead of relying on boolean inStock flag

missingFeatures.title: Order cancellation workflow
missingFeatures.detail: No formal cancellation policy enforcement: time window for cancellation, automatic stock restoration, refund processing. The current status change is a simple string update.

missingFeatures.title: Partial shipment tracking
missingFeatures.detail: OrderItem has qtyShipped field but no logic uses it. Partial fulfillment/backorder is not implemented.

missingFeatures.title: Return management system
missingFeatures.detail: No return workflow: RMA generation, return shipping label, refund calculation, restocking. Returns are manual.

missingFeatures.title: Inventory alerts and auto-reorder
missingFeatures.detail: No automated alerts when stock drops below threshold. restockService.ts exists but no integration with order flow.

missingFeatures.title: Order confirmation email templates
missingFeatures.detail: emailService.ts has template rendering but no order-specific templates (order_confirmation, order_shipped, order_delivered).

missingFeatures.title: Payment gateway integration
missingFeatures.detail: Payment is recorded as a string field. No actual payment processing, verification, or refund capability.

missingFeatures.title: Coupon usage tracking per user
missingFeatures.detail: MOCK_ADMIN_COUPONS has usesPerUser limit but no enforcement mechanism in validateCoupon().

missingFeatures.title: Order search and filtering API
missingFeatures.detail: No search by date range, status, or customer. Admin panel relies on client-side filtering of all data.

missingFeatures.title: Audit trail for order changes
missingFeatures.detail: Invoices have auditLog but orders only have statusHistory with no user tracking or IP logging.

missingFeatures.title: Multi-currency support
missingFeatures.detail: All prices hardcoded in EUR. No currency conversion for international customers.

dataQuality.title: Products without stock count
dataQuality.detail: 198 of 283 products have inStock=true but no numeric stock count. This prevents stock management and overselling detection.

recommendations.title: Implement server-side validation
recommendations.detail: All business logic (pricing, stock, discounts, points) runs client-side and can be manipulated. Priority 1 before going to production.

recommendations.title: Add database persistence
recommendations.detail: Replace all localStorage operations with database calls. Current localStorage has no concurrent access protection, size limits (5-10MB), and is vulnerable to data loss.

recommendations.title: Implement proper authentication
recommendations.detail: Current auth uses localStorage with client-side session hash. Implement JWT or session-based auth with server-side validation.

recommendations.title: Add stock reservation/locking
recommendations.detail: Implement stock reservation during checkout to prevent overselling. Current implementation has race condition: two users can buy the last item simultaneously.

recommendations.title: Input sanitization at all entry points
recommendations.detail: Apply sanitizeString() consistently to all user inputs during storage, not just display. Add SQL pattern detection for defense-in-depth.

recommendations.title: Implement proper email service
recommendations.detail: Replace localStorage email logging with actual email sending (Resend, SendGrid). Add email queue for reliability.

recommendations.title: Add order total verification
recommendations.detail: Server must recalculate order totals from product prices, not trust client-provided totals. Current architecture allows price manipulation.

recommendations.title: Implement idempotency keys for orders
recommendations.detail: Add idempotency tokens to prevent duplicate order submission on network retries or rapid clicks.

recommendations.title: Add comprehensive logging and monitoring
recommendations.detail: No error logging, performance monitoring, or business event tracking. Add structured logging for debugging and analytics.

recommendations.title: Implement GDPR compliance features
recommendations.detail: No data export, deletion, or consent management. Required for EU customers.
